name: bolt
documentation:
# Bolt

[![GitHub Actions](https://github.com/mcbeet/bolt/workflows/CI/badge.svg)](https://github.com/mcbeet/bolt/actions)
[![PyPI](https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/bolt.svg)](https://pypi.org/project/bolt/)
[![PyPI - Python Version](https://img.shields.io/pypi/pyversions/bolt.svg)](https://pypi.org/project/bolt/)
[![Code style: black](https://img.shields.io/badge/code%20style-black-000000.svg)](https://github.com/ambv/black)
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/900530660677156924?color=7289DA&label=discord&logo=discord&logoColor=fff)](https://discord.gg/98MdSGMm8j)

> Supercharge Minecraft commands with Python.

```python
infinite_invisibility = {
    Id: 14,
    Duration: 999999,
    Amplifier: 1,
    ShowParticles: false,
}

def summon_chicken_army(n):
    for i in range(n):
        summon chicken ~i ~ ~ {
            Tags: [f"quack{i}"],
            IsChickenJockey: true,
            Passengers: [{
                id: zombie,
                IsBaby: true,
                ActiveEffects: [infinite_invisibility]
            }]
        }

say Go forth, my minions!
summon_chicken_army(16)
```

## Installation

The package can be installed with `pip`.

```bash
$ pip install bolt
```

## Contributing

Contributions are welcome. Make sure to first open an issue discussing the problem or the new feature before creating a pull request. The project uses [`poetry`](https://python-poetry.org/).

```bash
$ poetry install
```

You can run the tests with `poetry run pytest`.

```bash
$ poetry run pytest
```

The project must type-check with [`pyright`](https://github.com/microsoft/pyright). If you're using VSCode the [`pylance`](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=ms-python.vscode-pylance) extension should report diagnostics automatically. You can also install the type-checker locally with `npm install` and run it from the command-line.

```bash
$ npm run watch
$ npm run check
```

The code follows the [`black`](https://github.com/psf/black) code style. Import statements are sorted with [`isort`](https://pycqa.github.io/isort/).

```bash
$ poetry run isort bolt tests
$ poetry run black bolt tests
$ poetry run black --check bolt tests
```

---

functions.name: bolt.helpers.get_bolt_helpers
documentation: Return a collection of helpers used by the generated code.

functions.name: bolt.commands.memo
documentation: Inspect and manage bolt memo storage.

classes.name: bolt.module.UnusableCompilationUnit
documentation: Raised when a compilation unit can not be used to instantiate a module.

classes.name: bolt.module.SilentCompilationInterrupt
documentation: Raised for interrupting the compilation when an unusable compilation unit already reported its own diagnostics.

classes.name: bolt.module.AssetModule
documentation: Class representing a bolt module in a resource pack.

classes.name: bolt.module.CompiledModule
documentation: Class holding the state of a compiled module.

classes.name: bolt.module.ModuleParseCallback
documentation: Callback required by the module manager for parsing.

methods.name: bolt.module.ModuleManager.current_path
documentation: Return the path corresponding to the currently executing module.

methods.name: bolt.module.ModuleManager.lookup
documentation:
Lookup the associated source file in the compilation database.

If we're currently in an overlay, fall back to the source file in the main
data pack.

methods.name: bolt.module.ModuleManager.match_ast
documentation: Return the compilation unit and executable module for the current ast.

methods.name: bolt.module.ModuleManager.eval
documentation: Run the module and return the output ast.

methods.name: bolt.module.ModuleManager.error_handler
documentation: Error handler for running module code.

methods.name: bolt.module.ModuleManager.parse_push
documentation: Push the current file onto the parse stack.

methods.name: bolt.module.ModuleManager.export_prelude
documentation: Export local variables and macros from a given module into a prelude import.

classes.name: bolt.module.ModuleCacheBackend
documentation: Cache backend that also restores the generated modules.

classes.name: bolt.contrib.debug_codegen.DebugCodegenEmitter
documentation: Visitor that interrupts the compilation process and dumps the generated code.

classes.name: bolt.ast.AstFunctionSignatureElement
documentation: Base node for function signature element.

classes.name: bolt.ast.AstFunctionSignaturePositionalMarker
documentation: Ast function signature positional marker node.

classes.name: bolt.ast.AstFunctionSignatureVariadicArgument
documentation: Ast function signature variadic argument node.

classes.name: bolt.ast.AstFunctionSignatureVariadicMarker
documentation: Ast function signature variadic marker node.

classes.name: bolt.ast.AstFunctionSignatureVariadicKeywordArgument
documentation: Ast function signature variadic keyword argument node.

modules.name: bolt.contrib.sandbox
documentation: Plugin that sandboxes the bolt runtime.

classes.name: bolt.contrib.sandbox.SecurityError
documentation: Raised when the sandboxed runtime attempts to perform a forbidden operation.

functions.name: bolt.contrib.defer.defer
documentation: Plugin that makes the defer utility available globally.

classes.name: bolt.contrib.defer.AstDeferCommand
documentation:
Ast defer command node.

Same as AstDefer but allows the node to pass as a regular AstCommand.

methods.name: bolt.runtime.Runtime.from_module_import
documentation: Import a specific name from a module.

methods.name: bolt.runtime.Runtime.get_nested_location
documentation: Return the resource location associated with the current level of nesting.

methods.name: bolt.runtime.Runtime.finalize
documentation: Plugin that runs at the end of the build.

classes.name: bolt.runtime.NonFunctionSerializer
documentation: Serializer that preserves the original source of non-function files.

methods.name: bolt.emit.CommandEmitter.scope
documentation: Create a new scope to gather commands.

methods.name: bolt.emit.CommandEmitter.capture_output
documentation: Invoke a user-defined function and return the list of generated commands.

functions.name: bolt.codegen.visit_single
documentation: Yield the node and make sure that it returns a single result.

functions.name: bolt.codegen.visit_multiple
documentation: Yield all the nodes and return a single result pointing to the new children.

functions.name: bolt.codegen.visit_generic
documentation: Recursively yield all the fields and return a result pointing to the updated node.

functions.name: bolt.codegen.visit_body
documentation: Emit each individual command in the current scope.

classes.name: bolt.codegen.CodegenStatement

methods.name: bolt.codegen.CodegenStatement.flatten
documentation: Yield the indented statements with their associated line number.
Python statement emitted by the codegen, which can recursively contain other statements.

methods.name: bolt.codegen.Accumulator.extract_lineno
documentation: Utility to extract the line number.

methods.name: bolt.codegen.Accumulator.block
documentation: Wrap statements in an indented block.

methods.name: bolt.codegen.Accumulator.enclose
documentation: Enclose statements starting from the given index.

classes.name: bolt.codegen.WithStatementFusion
documentation: Finalizer for fusing nested with statements.

classes.name: bolt.codegen.RootCommandCollector
documentation: Collector for commands in a standalone root node.

classes.name: bolt.semantics.UndefinedIdentifier
documentation:
Raised when an identifier is not defined.

Attributes
----------
identifier
    The identifier that couldn't be found.
lexical_scope
    The current scope.

classes.name: bolt.semantics.UnboundLocalIdentifier
documentation:
Raised when mutating a variable before assignment.

This is a specialized error for code that tries to access and mutate a variable
with no local binding in the current scope.

classes.name: bolt.semantics.InconsistentIdentifierStorage
documentation:
Raised when trying to change the storage of an already existing variable.

Attributes
----------
identifier
    The identifier with a prior conflicting definition in the current scope.
storage
    The target storage of the inconsistent binding.
lexical_scope
    The current scope.

classes.name: bolt.semantics.Binding
documentation:
Variable binding.

Attributes
----------
origin
    The code fragment performing the variable binding.
references
    Other parts of the code that use the value set by the binding.
cutoff
    The number of references in common after forking.

classes.name: bolt.semantics.Variable
documentation:
Variable definition.

Attributes
----------
storage
    The type of storage for the variable.
bindings
    Associated bindings updating the value or the storage of the variable.
cutoff
    The number of bindings in common after forking.

classes.name: bolt.semantics.LexicalScope
documentation:
Class for managing variable scopes during parsing.

Attributes
----------
parent
    Parent scope if the current scope has one.
variables
    Dictionary holding variable definitions.
dirty
    Flag to skip reconciliation after forking in case no additional
    variables or bindings were introduced.

classes.name: bolt.semantics.GlobalScope
documentation: Specialized global scope to fork more efficiently.

classes.name: bolt.semantics.ProcMacroScope
documentation: Dedicated type for proc macro scope.

functions.name: bolt.parse.get_stream_lexical_scope
documentation: Return the lexical scope currently associated with the token stream.

functions.name: bolt.parse.get_stream_macro_scope
documentation: Return the macro identifiers currently available.

classes.name: bolt.parse.ImprovedErrorHandler
documentation: Parser that tries to recover more specific error alternatives.

classes.name: bolt.parse.BranchScopeManager
documentation: Parser that manages accessible identifiers for conditional branches.

classes.name: bolt.parse.FinalExpressionParser
documentation: Parser that verifies that the expression isn't followed by anything.

classes.name: bolt.parse.EscapeAnalysisParser
documentation: Initiate escape analysis on a nested block.

classes.name: bolt.parse.VanillaReturnHandler
documentation: Turn vanilla return into bolt return statement when not prefixed by execute.

classes.name: bolt.parse.IfElseLoweringParser
documentation: Parser that turns elif statements into if statements in an else clause.

classes.name: bolt.parse.BreakContinueConstraint
documentation: Constraint that makes sure that break and continue statements only occur in loops.

classes.name: bolt.parse.SubcommandConstraint
documentation: Prevent using the specified prototypes as general subcommands.

classes.name: bolt.parse.DeferredRootBacktracker
documentation: Parser for backtracking over deferred root nodes.

classes.name: bolt.parse.LexicalScopeConstraint
documentation: Constraint that restricts specific statements to the given scope type.

classes.name: bolt.parse.BuiltinCallRestriction
documentation: Only allow call expressions on builtins.
